transcription.text: Digby something wrong George Digby I told you squeeze the tomatoes squeeze the melons but please don't squeeze the new Charmin bathroom tissue look this new Charmin is so soft I'll handle this George don't you ladies believe in signs but this new Charmin is so soft so deep down squeezably soft we just can't resist it squeeze yourself no no he's on duty I'll check this out it's soft got nice fragrance it's irresistible irresistible price too right George Whipple how can you blame these nice ladies why you can't resist the new Charmin either you old fake new squeezably soft Charmin bathroom tissue from Procter and Gamble take it home and squeeze it
